versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   datadog-3-170-1                 true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: datadog
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: datadog-3-170-1
      name: datadog
      namespace: datadog
      values: |
        datadog:
          datadog:
            apiKey: my-datadog-api-key
            clusterName: my.datadog.cluster
            site: datadoghq.com
